hero.headline:
Sense with Physical AI
Connect with Wireless AI
hero.description: In Physical AI, we apply VLA models to robotic manipulation and research model compression for edge deployment. In Wireless AI, our core topics are Wi-Fi CSI-based indoor localization and enhancing LoRa demodulation performance at the physical layer.
hero.panelText: We combine data-centric network design with smart IoT systems to deliver reliable, autonomous industrial connectivity.

cards.title: Wireless IoT Communication
cards.description: We study LPWA and resource allocation for diverse IoT service requirements.

cards.title: SON / KDN
cards.description: We develop AI-powered autonomous network control for planning, optimization, and self-healing.

cards.title: Smart Factory
cards.description: We build industrial IoT solutions for process monitoring, predictive maintenance, and object tracking.

research.heading: Exploring physical intelligence and wireless AI

areas.title: Physical AI
areas.description: We study how AI perceives and responds to physical-world signals and environments. From computer vision and anomaly detection to signal-based localization, we build intelligent systems that operate in real-world spaces.

areas.title: Wireless AI
areas.description: Rooted in wireless communication research, we integrate AI and ML into technologies like Wi-Fi and LoRa. We pursue smarter wireless environments through automated signal processing, resource allocation, and channel estimation.

items.title: Attending Conferences Worldwide
items.description: The lab supports attendance at domestic conferences and, based on your research progress, international ones too. Engage with the latest work from researchers worldwide, experience keynotes and discussions firsthand, and discover new ideas through real conversation — the true value of being there in person.

items.title: Overseas Research Lab Visit
items.description: Through the advisor's international network, visit partner research institutions in Japan, Indonesia, and beyond for up to one month — immersing yourself in a global research environment.

items.title: Government & Industry R&D
items.description: Participate in funded projects from MSIT and MND, as well as industry partnerships — applying research to solve real-world engineering problems.

items.title: Hands-On Technical Skills
items.description: PyTorch deep learning, ROS robot control, GNU Radio & SDR signal processing, LoRa hardware — skills that hold up in both academic research and industry.

items.title: International Journal Co-authorship
items.description: Impactful work earns you co-authorship on SCI-indexed journals and major domestic and international conferences. We target at least one publication before graduation.
